posts.text: Man, that pitch was low. We stole that strike.
Boom! USA to the WBC finals. Awesome, intense game.
The WBC is incredible television. So good.

Tip times are below. Adjust your illnesses accordingly.


CBS Sports (@CBSSports)

Bring on the madness! The tip times are set for the First Round on Thursday and Friday.











— https://nitter.net/CBSSports/status/2033342456096334256#m

I can’t believe this is real.


End Wokeness (@EndWokeness)

In order to compete at the Oscars for Best Picture, all films must meet the "diversity inclusion" quota.

Here are those rules. Yes, this is real.







— https://nitter.net/EndWokeness/status/2033341843681812868#m
BTW, no idea who this is, but he has me blocked on here. Which is perfect.

Does The Athletic employ anyone normal? Does this company have actual fans? I know they have subscribers because they gave it away for free for a decade — it has lost hundreds of millions so far — and now it’s bundled, but, man, what an insufferable collection of woke scolds.
The bracket is out. Mostly chalk in early odds on match ups, no big upsets forecast. SMU is a 7.5 point favorite over Miami-Ohio in play in round. Who ya got to make a run?
Vandy and Florida will play again in the Sweet 16.
This is an easy fix, I don’t understand why committee keeps doing it. Happens virtually every year.
Mizzou gets a home game in St. Louis as the 10 seed against 7 seed Miami, huge advantage there and honestly shouldn’t happen.
St. John’s as a five is wild, Rick Pitino against Duke with a week to prepare in the Sweet 16 would be a hell of a game.
Love that CBS went straight to the bracket at the start of their show. Infinitely better TV than the way the college football playoff bracket was revealed.
Acuff is the best player in the SEC this year. Fun to watch.
Razorbacks win SEC tourney. Criticize John Calipari all you want, but Arkansas in year two with him is better than Kentucky is in year two without him. All he does is win everywhere he coaches.

This is a huge tech subsidy to left wing media. Many of these left wing media businesses couldn’t exist without the algorithm being rigged in their favor.


Media Research Center (@theMRC)

Only 2% of Google News's top stories in February came from right-leaning media.





— https://nitter.net/theMRC/status/2033151533911568796#m

Venezuela just took down Japan. These WBC games have been awesome.

Video
Clay Travis is LOVING his new Tesla!
Auburn or Miami (OH)... Who Deserves To Make The Tournament
Who is the most overrated SEC team? 🤫⬇️

"Yet another big swing and a miss for San Francisco."
Trump Pledges Asylum To Iranian Women's Soccer Team
The Maxx Crosby Trade Doesn't Fix What's Broken in Baltimore
NFL Free Agency Chaos, Did The Ravens OVERREACH?! | OutKick the Show w/ Clay Travis
Is 24 teams the right number for an expanded College Football Playoff?
No players will be present at the White House roundtable
